user.title: Set up Smart Reminder
user.description: Configure the global Do Not Disturb period and responses to repeated actions. Reminders can individually ignore DnD.

data.already_snoozed_error_text: Error text for an already snoozed reminder
data.already_completed_error_text: Error text for an already completed reminder

init.title: Smart Reminder settings
init.description: Reminders due during this period are postponed until the period ends, unless Ignore DnD is enabled for that reminder. Equal start and end times disable DnD. Error texts are returned by repeated action events.

data.already_snoozed_error_text: Error text for an already snoozed reminder
data.already_completed_error_text: Error text for an already completed reminder

reminder_id.name: ID
reminder_id.description: Optional stable ID. One is generated when omitted.

name.name: Name
name.description: Optional display name. The text is used when omitted.

at.name: Date and time
at.description: When the reminder should first trigger.

text.name: Text
text.description: Text sent with the reminder event.

recipient_ids.name: Recipient IDs
recipient_ids.description: Arbitrary recipient IDs copied to each event.

ignore_dnd.name: Ignore DnD
ignore_dnd.description: Allow triggering during the global quiet period.

snooze.name: Snooze reminder
snooze.description: Postpone a reminder by a compact duration such as 1h30m.

reminder_id.name: Reminder ID
reminder_id.description: ID of the reminder to snooze.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Combination of days, hours and minutes, for example 2d3h15m.

complete.name: Complete reminder
complete.description: Complete a reminder and schedule its next occurrence or delete a one-time reminder.

reminder_id.name: Reminder ID
reminder_id.description: ID of the reminder to complete.
